ddls:
CREATE TABLE "power_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the power line */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the power line in kilometers */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage rating of the power line in kV */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the power line in MW */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* The date when the power line was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* The date of the last inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the last inspection */,
  "maintenance_next_due" TEXT /* The date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* The date when the status of the power line last changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_lines_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the power station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the power station */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the power station in MW */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* The date when the power station was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* The date of the last inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the last inspection */,
  "maintenance_next_due" TEXT /* The date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* The date when the status of the power station last changed */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_codes" (
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status code */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status code */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* A numeric value indicating the severity of the status */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action to take when this status is encountered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the power line being measured */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the power station being measured */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the measurement was taken */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the measurement was taken */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the measurement was taken */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the measurement was taken */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status code of the measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature measurement at the time of the measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity measurement at the time of the measurement */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed measurement at the time of the measurement */,
  "voltage_level" REAL /* Voltage level measurement at the time of the measurement */,
  "current_level" REAL /* Current level measurement at the time of the measurement */,
  "power_factor" REAL /* Power factor at the time of the measurement */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency measurement at the time of the measurement */,
  "total_power_output" REAL /* Total power output at the time of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES power_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_status_code FOREIGN KEY ("status_code") REFERENCES status_codes ("status_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, maintenance) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* The date and time the user last changed their password */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active or deactivated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role has admin privileges */,
  "can_access_sensitive_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can access sensitive data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement that triggered the alarm */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alarm was triggered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* A numeric value indicating the severity of the alarm */,
  "acknowledged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alarm has been acknowledged */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who acknowledged the alarm */,
  "acknowledged_at" TEXT /* The date and time the alarm was acknowledged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_acknowledged_by FOREIGN KEY ("acknowledged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarm_types" (
  "alarm_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm type */,
  "alarm_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alarm type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm type */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* A numeric value indicating the severity of the alarm type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout, view) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to perform the action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Report data */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* The date and time the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
